chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ نُوحٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF NOAH<sup>as</sup> ON THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 278)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 278)
text: إِنَّ لِلَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَلَكاً مَا بَيْنَ شَحْمَةِ أُذُنِهِ إِلَى عَاتِقِهِ مَسِيرَةُ خَمْسِمِائَةِ عَامٍ خَفَقَانِ الطَّيْرِ.

en.hubeali: H 14853 – From him, from one of his companions, from Ziyad Al-Qindy, from Durust Bin Abu Mansour, from a man, who has narrated the following:
Abu Abdullahasws having said that: ‘Allahazwj has an Angel, whose span between his ear lobe to his shoulder is of five hundred years of the travel distance of a bird’.
en.sarwar: 406. From him, from one of his companions, from Ziyad Al-Qindy, from Durust Bin Abu Mansour, from a man, who has narrated the following: Abu Abdullah (a.s.) having said that: ‘Allah (azwj) has an Angel, whose span between his ear lobe to his shoulder is of five hundred years of the travel distance of a bird’.
